description: Workflow configuration for the Apex Neural agent ecosystem. Controls behavior toggles like Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) checkpoints.

humanInTheLoop.description: When enabled, the Orchestrator pauses after the specified agent phases to present output for user review and approval before proceeding to the next phase.

planner.description: Pause after the Planner completes to present the plan for user review and approval before moving to Architecture.
